'''Standard scout ships''' were small, lightly armed craft commonly used by explorers. They also made up the fleet of the [[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson slavers]]. Though not meant for heavy combat, they could easily outgun the transports Merson slavers preyed upon.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 24}} {{Flash}}
